queue_item.action: Integrate Event Timing and Long Animation Frames verdicts into one deployment-bound evidence packet without collapsing correlation, congestion, or claim truth.

progress.finding: Interaction correlation and main-thread congestion are complementary evidence dimensions. Acceptance requires both classifier verdicts to be independently retained and bound to one exact source commit, verified deployment identity, target device/browser, observation window, and ordered interaction sequence.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit source.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should run the R-005 and R-006 classifiers around one exact deployed gesture, then build and verify this packet with immutable deployment identity and target iPhone Safari context. A verified packet still does not prove audibility or subjective smoothness.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Add a browser-side capture adapter that closes both observers around an explicit interaction window and emits inputs for the packet builder without inventing support or silently dropping zero-interactionId observations.
